356 J2A J2A_PAIN_FREQUENCY (J2A) Pain Frequency CHAR 1 Health conditions: pain symptoms - frequency in last 7 days. 0 = No Pain, 1 = Pain less than daily, 2 = Pain daily, "-" = Unknown.
357 J2B J2B_PAIN_INTENSITY (J2B) Pain Intensity CHAR 1 Health conditions: pain symptoms - intensity in last 7 days. 0 = Mild Pain, 1 = Moderate Pain, 2 = Times when pain is horrible or excruciatin, "-" =
